automatic_vs_manual: automatic cost fields are extracted without gold; discovery stages, first wrong, and correctness are filled only by blinded scorers with raw-line/call-id evidence
codemap_internal_time_reason: server-side timing instrumentation is intentionally absent because adding it would change the baseline binary; use OpenCode tool state start/end as client-observed elapsed time
navigation_call_rule: count completed built-in or codemap navigation calls; exclude MCP initialize and tools/list handshake messages
post_first_wrong_rule: compute only after a scorer fixes first_wrong.raw_event_line/completed_call_index; otherwise every post-first-wrong field remains null
validity_rule: agent-caused timeout, 30-model-step cap, and 2 MiB captured-output cap are valid observed outcomes; transient provider/network/auth startup failures are infrastructure-invalid; MCP/code/config/prompt/model/limit/binary/index/source/sandbox drift invalidates the generation
